zh.lifeSummary: 當Susannah Crigdon於1214年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，她的父親Sir John Crigdon20歲，母親Mrs. John Crigdon23歲。她和Sir Walter William de Baskerville至少有10個兒子。她去世於1268年在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susannah Crigdon于1214年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，她的父亲Sir John Crigdon20岁，母亲Mrs. John Crigdon23岁。她和Sir Walter William de Baskerville至少有10个儿子。她去世于1268年在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Crigdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rikedun, a diminutive of Rikke, short for Rikard (see Rickard ) + the Old French hypocoristic suffix -dun. Compare Higdon .

variants.name: Rickard
meanings: German and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Richard  .
Americanized form of German   Reichardt   or   Reichard   or   Richard  .

variants.name: Ryden
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Lars, Per.

Swedish (Rydén): habitational or topographic name composed of the element ryd, meaning ‘woodland clearing’ (in placenames) or ‘moor’ (in some dialects), + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’.
English: habitational name from any of several places called Rydon, such as those in Ashton and Abbotskerwell in Devon, which probably derive from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

en.lifeSummary: When Susannah Crigdon was born in 1214, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Crigdon, was 20 and her mother, Mrs. John Crigdon, was 23. She had at least 10 sons with Sir Walter William de Baskerville. She died in 1268, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susannah Crigdon est née en 1214, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Crigdon, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Crigdon, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 10 fils avec Sir Walter William de Baskerville. Elle est décédée en 1268, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susannah Crigdon 1214 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Crigdon 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs. John Crigdon 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter William de Baskerville mindestens 10 Söhne. Sie starb 1268 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Crigdon è nata il nel 1214 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Crigdon, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs. John Crigdon, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 10 figli con Sir Walter William de Baskerville. Morì nel 1268, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Susannah Crigdonが1214年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Crigdonは20歳，母Mrs. John Crigdonは23歳であった。彼女はSir Walter William de Baskervilleとの間に少なくとも10人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1268年に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susannah Crigdon(이)가 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Crigdon(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Crigdon(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter William de Baskerville(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Crigdon nasceu em 1214, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Crigdon, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Crigdon, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 10 filhos com Sir Walter William de Baskerville. Ela faleceu em 1268, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susannah Crigdon родилась в 1214 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Crigdon было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Crigdon, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 10 сыновей от Sir Walter William de Baskerville. Она умерла в 1268 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susannah Crigdon nació en 1214, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Crigdon, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Crigdon, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos con Sir Walter William de Baskerville. Murió en 1268, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
